questions.question: Passage-based set pattern: A 250-450 word original factual passage is followed by grouped questions. Which option describes a CUET-level factual-passage distractor?
options: It is partly supported by one sentence but ignores the author's larger point.
It is unrelated to the passage and can be removed instantly.
It copies the passage title and is therefore automatically correct.
It asks a definition without requiring passage reading.
